properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v5 v6 v7

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Spiritual battle is going on today It's not against flesh and blood And my mind, it is the battleground Where the enemy tries to take control But I declare that I am an overcomer Through Christ who strengthens me

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: When the battle is raging, I'll keep on fighting And I'll keep pressing on For the Lord goes before me Defender behind me His angels are all around So I'll keep on fighting for the Faith I'll keep on pressing by His Grace And I’ll make it through

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: The weapons I have are not swords and guns Oh but the Mighty Word of God The Name of Jesus is my strong tower Unto that Name will I give praise Every Amen, and Every Hallelujah Brings me near to victory

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: When the battle is raging, I'll keep on fighting And I'll keep pressing on For the Lord goes before me Defender behind me His angels are all around So I'll keep on fighting for the faith I'll keep on pressing by His Grace

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: Greater is He that is within me, Greater than the Enemy And He that is in me, Is the One that's really fighting for me, Yes He is

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: When the battle is raging I'll keep on fighting And I'll keep pressing on For the Lord goes before me Defender behind me His Angels are all around

verse.name: v7
verse.lines: When the battle is raging I'll keep on fighting And I'll keep pressing on For the Lord goes before me Defender behind me His angels are all around So I'll keep on fighting for the faith I'll keep on pressing by His Grace And I’ll make it through And I’ll make it through
